arts.ttl: Leverkusen inform Bayern of their Nübel interest
arts.sum: In search of a new goalkeeper for next season, Bayer Leverkusen set their sights on Alexander Nübel

arts.ttl: Report: Wirtz roulette takes another twist as Bayern contact family
arts.sum: Die Werkself's prized possession Florian Wirtz could be pried away from their grasp by Bayern Munich who are keen to get their man.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Union Berlin preview: Die Werkself look to put pressure on Bayern
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to put the pressure on leaders Bayern Munich when they welcome Union Berlin for Saturday’s home meeting with Union Berlin.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz to make Bayer Leverkusen return this weekend
arts.sum: Bayer 04 Leverkusen trainer Xabi Alonso announced that German superstar Florian Wirtz will officially make his comeback this weekend while speaking at his Friday press conference.

arts.ttl: Wirtz set for Leverkusen return against Union Berlin
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz has been passed fit for Bayer Leverkusen's Bundesliga clash with Union Berlin on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich ready to go into debt to fight Manchester City for Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich are ready to go into debt as they try to sign Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz in the summer. Bayern want to sign Wirtz this summer, and…

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach linked with attackers Benedict Hollerbach and Fabian Rieder
arts.sum: Borussia Mönchengladbach are currently being linked with two Bundesliga professionals.

arts.ttl: Union Berlin striker Andrej Ilic speaks on rift with Bo Svensson: “He never talked to me.”
arts.sum: Union Berlin loanee Andrej Ilic revealed that he would have left his Bundesliga side had previous trainer Bo Svensson not been sacked.
